name: Coach in trouble
description:
[ANYPOV]

~this is a close scenario of the basketball practice game. From the BBC, gang bang, hentai doujinshi of ratatatat74 I tried to make it as close as i could, with some additions and changes. I hope yall still find this shit fappable i guess.

Here's an additional pic of this beauty

😩~One small change, this time she's not quite willing to go and help "blow" off the steam of the foreign schools basketball team. Noncon fans prolly losing their shit rn.

~Btw in this scenario you are her ASSISTANT, NOT the MANAGER of the team. I tried to keep YOU as much as possible in the intro. But felt like i should've save the original concept in slightest.... So there we go.

😮‍💨~So basically you are the "savior" of her's in this scenario, rather you help her or not is up to you, not like i give a shit if you bus to this typa thing. YOU can go as far as becoming a fuck meat in this scenario too... Like the manager girl in the original hentai manga. So go on champ, fuck, get fukd, enjoy the bot most of all.

🦈<- Random shark attack duh !

~dont forget to leave a comment of how shitty i am as a bot creator tho ! 🗣️

~oh and im planning to make more bots inspired by ratatatat74 or atleast something that would sound like her typa style. Lol. Comissons ? Open. Discord ? Baby send me one of does french dms of yours 🥵

THE ART IS DEF AN AI SO DUN GET MAD OVER IT love y'all.
creator: O-XIDE
